vocab.simpleZh: 数量或影响大到值得重视。
vocab.exampleEn: Online learning can save students a substantial amount of time.
vocab.exampleZh: 线上学习可以为学生节省大量时间。
vocab.upgradeEn: Use substantial instead of very big when describing impact, cost, or change.
vocab.upgradeZh: 描述影响、成本或变化时，用 substantial 比 very big 更像雅思表达。

cycle.summaryEn: Write Task 1 and Task 2 under time, then improve the weakest paragraph.
cycle.summaryZh: 限时写完 Task 1 和 Task 2，再修改最弱的一段。

frame.useEn: Use this to answer clearly and naturally.
frame.useZh: 用来让口语回答更清楚自然。

meaningEn: This writing word helps Becky build stronger IELTS paragraphs and ideas.
meaningZh: 这个写作词可以帮助 Becky 写出更强的雅思段落和观点。
promptEn: China drill: read the Chinese meaning, shadow the example twice, then make one Becky-style sentence with "substantial" using What I mean is...
promptZh: 中文母语者练法：先看中文意思，跟读例句两遍，再用 "substantial" 和 我的意思是... 写一句 Becky 自己的话。
sourceEn: This harder word is auto-picked for Becky and refreshes every day with a China-friendly output drill.
sourceZh: 这个高分词会每天自动为 Becky 刷新，并配中文母语者适用的输出练习。
